dishes.name: Bacon & Jalapeno Stuffed Cheesy Bread
dishes.raw_description: Our oven-baked breadsticks are stuffed with cheese, smoked bacon and jalapeno peppers - covered in a blend of cheese made with 100% real mozzarella and cheddar. Seasoned with a touch of garlic and Parmesan. Add marinara or your favorite dipping cup for an additional charge.
dishes.reasoning: Contains bacon (meat) and cheese. | evidence: “stuffed with cheese, smoked bacon and jalapeno peppers”
